chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-1259 0f 2023 Date Order with signature of Jud For hearing of main case 06.12.2023 Petitioner is present in person Mr Zulfiqar Ali Naich, AAG with Najaf Alأ, Junior Clerk, Municipal Committee Khairpur +٦ ٠٦+ + ٠٠ وو٦ +٠ ٦ ٦ Learned AAG has submitted statement on behalf of Respondent N0.4 withi an original bearing No41781636, amounting to R5300,000/- which Is handed over to the Petitioner With regard remaining amount, official present undertakes that same would be paid to the petitioner in three equal monthly installments Petitioner satisfied a٨٥ this petition stands di5p05٤0 accordingly However default or nonpayment of said amount to the petitioner would expose violator to the contempt proceedinPs along al0n8 cheque
